title: New York Courts Sanction Attorneys Over AI-Fabricated Citations in Filings
blurb: Fake citations from ChatGPT cost New York lawyers thousands in fines and default judgments. What courts now demand.

title: Meta Opts Instagram Users Into AI Image Generation From Public Photos by Default
blurb: Your public Instagram photos can now be turned into AI images—no notice, no consent required. Here's how to opt out.

title: Cost Per Token Emerges as AI's Defining Battle in Mid-2026
blurb: Why one agent action fires hundreds of model calls—and who's racing to make each one cheaper.
